# go-httpbin representative documented endpoints.
/get
/post
/put
/patch
/delete
/anything
/anything/{anything}
/headers
/ip
/user-agent
/uuid
/forms/post
/status/{code}
/redirect/{n}
/relative-redirect/{n}
/absolute-redirect/{n}
/cookies
/cookies/set
/cookies/delete
/stream/{n}
/delay/{seconds}
/bytes/{n}
/drip
/range/{n}
/cache
/cache/{seconds}
/etag/{etag}
/response-headers
